steps.title: Calculate the retail price
steps.content:
The retail price is 280% of the wholesale price of \$4.00:
$$2.80 \times 4.00 = 11.20$$
So the retail price is \$11.20.

steps.title: Apply the 80% discount
steps.content:
An 80% discount means paying the remaining 20% of the retail price:
$$0.20 \times 11.20 = 2.24$$
The answer is 2.24.
